"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.LogOutput = void 0; /** * Logs the stdout and stderr output of commands. */ class LogOutput { logger; constructor({ logger }) { this.logger = logger; } handle(commands) { commands.forEach((command) => { command.stdout.subscribe((text) => this.logger.logCommandText(text.toString(), command)); command.stderr.subscribe((text) => this.logger.logCommandText(text.toString(), command)); }); return { commands }; } } exports.LogOutput = LogOutput;
